title: guettarda cahosiana
intro: Guettarda cahosiana, also known as the "Lisbon Pride" or "Guettarda", is a flowering plant species in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Guettarda cahosiana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various infections, making it a valuable remedy in tropical regions. In herbal preparations, Guettarda cahosiana can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal properties.
